note: Dense full year: 12 highlights across 2 goal areas + a progressive arc (the two 'traffic' bullets) + a (logged 3×) repeat + 2 routine tallies + a pinned item. Must select, merge the arc, keep the strongest metrics verbatim, include the pinned item exactly once, and explain drops in setAside. The pinned item carries its goal-area tag ' [Quality & Craft]' EXACTLY as the app's SummaryViewModel.pinnedForPrompt emits it (a pinned entry is a PROCESSED row, so it always has a goalCategory) — without the tag the model reasonably routes the certification-flavoured item into development[], which rule 5 now endorses; the tag anchors it to a goal area so pinnedOnce finds it under achievements, matching real app input.
lengthCap: about one page — at most 5 achievements per goal area
frameworkBlock:
GOAL AREAS (results / projects map here):
- Delivery: Shipping planned product work on time and to spec.
- Quality & Craft: Reliability, code health, incident reduction.
BEHAVIOURS / COMPETENCIES (tag work that demonstrates these):
- Collaboration: Working across the team and beyond it.
- Ownership: Seeing problems through end to end without being asked.
DEVELOPMENT (optional):
- Learning & Growth: Courses, certifications, new skills.
pinned: Completed the PCI-DSS recertification audit with zero findings [Quality & Craft]
rollup:
GOAL AREA: Delivery
  Highlights (ranked by impact):
  - [impact 0.9] Shipped the checkout redesign to 100% of traffic, cutting drop-off 18% (project: Checkout Redesign) (metric: cut drop-off 18%) (standout) (evidences: Ownership)
  - [impact 0.75] Launched the saved-cards feature ahead of the holiday freeze (project: Checkout Redesign)
  - [impact 0.7] Started the checkout redesign rollout with the first 10% traffic experiment (project: Checkout Redesign)
  - [impact 0.7] Delivered the onboarding analytics dashboard for product (project: Onboarding v2) (metric: 12 events instrumented)
  - [impact 0.6] Migrated the promo-code service to the new platform (project: Checkout Redesign)
  - [impact 0.6] Built the A/B experiment harness for the funnel tests (project: Checkout Redesign)
  - [impact 0.55] Shipped address autocomplete for guest checkout (project: Checkout Redesign)
  - [impact 0.5] Refactored the cart state handling to remove a class of double-charge bugs (project: Checkout Redesign)
  - [impact 0.45] Wrote the missing API documentation for the checkout endpoints (logged 3×)
  Routine tallies:
  - code reviews: 84×
  Cumulative metrics: cut drop-off 18%

GOAL AREA: Quality & Craft
  Highlights (ranked by impact):
  - [impact 0.85] Cut payment failures 40% week-over-week after the incident fix (project: Payments Reliability) (metric: cut payment failures 40%) (standout)
  - [impact 0.6] Halved the flaky-test rate in the payments integration suite (project: Payments Reliability) (metric: flaky rate 9% to 4%)
  - [impact 0.5] Introduced structured logging across the payment services (project: Payments Reliability)
  Routine tallies:
  - support tickets: 57×

BEHAVIOUR EVIDENCE (concrete bullets that demonstrated each):
- Collaboration:
  - Unblocked the mobile team by writing the missing checkout API docs.
  - Paired with the design team on the onboarding analytics spec.
- Ownership:
  - Shipped the checkout redesign to 100% of traffic, cutting drop-off 18%.
  - Led the incident retro after the payments outage and drove the follow-up actions.
